title: Assistant Engineer - EV Chargers
description:
Company Overview

Power Automation is a wholly-owned subsidiary of SP Group, providing innovative and cutting-edge technologies that help to deliver Power System Control, Substation Automation, Sustainable Energy Solutions, and Protection Systems. Leading up to 1996, there was a marked increase in competition and decrease in operating margins of electric utilities, due to the deregulation and unbundling of energy production and transport processes in Singapore. Taking on the role as a systems integrator well-versed in utility automation solutions based on open-systems technologies while adhering strictly to industry standards, we produce quality products and services to our clients and customers.

Job Summary

You will perform regular inspections and preventive maintenance on EV chargers at various sites in Singapore, ensuring operational reliability and safety compliance while coordinating with stakeholders and maintaining accurate service records.

Responsibilities

  • Conduct regular inspections and perform preventive maintenance on EV chargers across multiple sites to ensure optimal functionality
  • Identify, diagnose, and report faults found during maintenance to enable timely repairs
  • Update firmware and software on charging stations to maintain up-to-date system performance
  • Adhere strictly to safety regulations and industry standards during all maintenance activities to ensure safe operations
  • Coordinate effectively with site owners, facility managers, and the customer's engineer/technical officer from the Tech Ops team to facilitate smooth maintenance processes
  • Maintain detailed service logs and prepare reports for management to track maintenance activities and equipment status

Required competencies and certifications

  • Hold a minimum of Higher Nitec in Electrical Engineering
  • Possess a valid Class 3 / 3A driver's license

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Certification as an Electric Vehicle Charger Equipment Specialist is an advantage
